title: Trunk-thing
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
The '''trunk-thing''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]]. In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], it took part in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with the [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Administrator Senior]] of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]] [[Lob Doluff]], and several other beings.

==Biography==
This [[Alien/Legends|alien]] played [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with the [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Administrator Senior]] of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]] [[Lob Doluff]], and several others in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]] at Doluff's home on [[Oseon 6845]]. When it learned from Calrissian that the [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] had regained control over the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]], it unhappily asked whether they would continue selling [[life-crystal]], expensive objects which granted the wearer a lengthened life.

==Personality and traits==
The creature struggled to pronounced "r's" and "l's". It had [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], green [[Blood/Legends|blood]], a small trunk beneath its eyes, and a name that was unpronounceable by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. Lando Calrissian, who was unaware of what [[Species/Legends|species]] the creature was, found it strange-looking.

==Behind the scenes==
This character makes a very brief appearance in the novel ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]''. Its species and [[Gender/Legends|gender]] are unidentified.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' {{1st}}
